content_markdown:
# "Victory in the Morning"
## Scripture
"Arise, my glory; arise, O Jerusalem; you have shed glory from yourself, and your wounded have fallen in your midst." - Isaiah 61:10
## Reflection
As warriors of Christ, we often face battles that leave us wounded and worn out. But it's in those moments of vulnerability that we're called to rise up and remember our glory – our identity in Christ. We're not just men trying to make it through the day; we're sons of the King, called to shine His light in a dark world. When we remember our glory, we're reminded of our strength, our purpose, and our hope. We can face any challenge, no matter how daunting it may seem, because we know that our God is with us. So let's arise, my brothers, and let our glory shine for all to see.

## Daily Challenge
"Do 20 squats while praying for the strength to carry your brothers in the Lord."
